name: Tahm Blackwell
bio:
Physical Appearance: Imperial male. Wears a brown shirt, light brown linens, and a pair of rough leather shoes - practical clothing for someone who works in the caves of Dunbarrow Cove. Armed with a fine steel cutlass. Carries a copy of the Guide to Anvil and some crab meat.
Race: Imperial
Personality Keywords: knowledgeable, professional, skilled, patient, specialized
Role: Tahm Blackwell is a Security expert who provides advanced training in lockpicking and lock-related magical services at Dunbarrow Cove. He can train others in Security up to level 75, making him a master instructor in the art of opening locks. He also sells unique magical items including Potions of Magnification, standard Open scrolls, and unique Restoration spells, though ironically his own magical abilities are limited to basic lock-opening spells.
Home: Dunbarrow Cove, specifically the small cave on the lower level where he sleeps from 10pm to 8am.
Daily Routine: Tahm spends most of his day near the Training Chest in the northwest corner of the main cave, close to the entrance from Smuggler's Cave. From 8am to 8pm he stands there reading, available to provide services and instruction to those who seek him out. At 8pm he takes a two-hour dinner break, then retires to the small cave on the lower level at 10pm to sleep. He offers his full services - training, spell sales, and bartering - at all times while awake. Even while sleeping, the Training Chest he maintains remains functional and his spells can still be purchased, though bartering is impossible.
The Training Chest: Tahm maintains a special Training Chest with a Hard Lock that immediately locks again every time it is successfully opened. This ingenious practice device allows aspiring lockpickers to hone their skills repeatedly without needing to search for new locks to pick. He spends most of his waking hours near this chest, presumably available to offer guidance and instruction to those using it.
Magical Abilities vs. Merchandise: Despite selling unique Potions of Magnification, Open scrolls, and unique Restoration spells, Tahm's own magical repertoire is surprisingly limited. He can only cast Open Very Easy Lock and Minor Fortify Security - basic utility spells that complement his expertise in mundane lockpicking. He is more of a skilled craftsman and instructor than a powerful mage, though he has access to rare magical items to sell to others.
Personality - The Patient Instructor: Tahm is a dedicated teacher of the lockpicking arts, maintaining the Training Chest and making himself available throughout the day to those seeking to improve their Security skills. His presence at Dunbarrow Cove as part of the "Security Expert" upgrade suggests he's professional enough to be hired specifically for his expertise. He spends his free time reading, suggesting a studious nature that complements his teaching role. His ability to train others up to level 75 indicates deep knowledge and patience - he can guide students well into advanced mastery of the craft.
author: Bethesda
